name: TEXTRON INC
summary: PART I TextronInc. is a multi-industry company that leverages its global network of aircraft, defense, industrial and finance businesses to provide customers with innovative products and services around the world. References to Textron, the Company, we, our and us in this Annual Report on Form10-K, unless otherwise indicated, refer to TextronInc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. Through 2025, we conducted our business through six operating segments: Textron Aviation, Bell, Textron Systems, Ind...
